title: Mytherra
controls_hint: Click the canvas, then Enter the World to join the shared realm
about: You are a minor god among many, watching one living, shared world that keeps turning whether or not you are present. Nudge mortals toward glory or ruin, raise legendary champions, and wager on a fate you help decide — alongside every other deity connected to the same realm.

controls.desc: Switch tabs, select regions/heroes, take divine actions

controls_note: The world is hosted on a shared server and advances on its own schedule — your Standing rises as you act, revealing more of the world and more divine arts. There is no local save; the realm persists on the server.
